commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh For the statutes of Omri are kept, and all the works of the house of Ahab, and you walk in their counsels; that I should make you a desolation, and your inhabitants a hissing: therefore you shall bear the reproach of my people. The statutes of Amri The wicked ways of Amri and Achab, idolatrous kings. (Challoner) They were the most infamous of Israel, 3 Kings xvi. (Worthington) Hebrew, "the statutes of Amri are kept. "Septuagint, "The precepts (ami) of my people shall parish "(Haydock) You, rich men. (Calmet) Septuagint, "you shall receive the reproach of people.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: The statutes of Amri: The wicked ways of Amri and Achab, idolatrous kings.
